title: Propulsion Assignment
description: Analyze the fundamentals of rocket propulsion systems and calculate specific impulse for different fuel types.

title: Combustion Analysis
description: Research and present combustion processes in rocket engines, including thermodynamic analysis.

title: Nozzle Design Project
description: Design a convergent-divergent nozzle for a given set of operating conditions and optimize for thrust.

title: Aerodynamics Quiz
description: Complete a comprehensive quiz on aerodynamic principles including Bernoulli's equation and flow classification.

title: Flow Analysis
description: Analyze subsonic and supersonic flow patterns around various airfoil shapes.

title: Heating Analysis
description: Calculate aerodynamic heating for a re-entry vehicle at various Mach numbers.

title: Structural Design Task
description: Design the primary structure for a small satellite, considering launch loads and orbital environment.

title: Orbital Calculations
description: Calculate orbital parameters for various mission profiles including Hohmann transfers.

title: Systems Integration Report
description: Write a comprehensive report on spacecraft subsystems integration and testing procedures.

title: Organic Compounds Lab
description: Identify and classify various organic compounds using systematic IUPAC naming conventions.

title: Reaction Mechanisms
description: Draw and explain the mechanisms of SN1, SN2, E1, and E2 reactions for given substrates.

title: Coordination Compounds
description: Predict the geometry and magnetic properties of transition metal complexes using crystal field theory.

title: Solid State Structures
description: Analyze crystal structures and calculate lattice parameters for given ionic compounds.

title: Thermodynamics Problem Set
description: Solve problems involving the first and second laws of thermodynamics for chemical systems.

title: Ancient Scripts Decipherment
description: Analyze and compare different ancient writing systems, focusing on their development and cultural context.

title: Latin Translation Exercise
description: Translate selected passages from classical Latin texts and analyze grammatical structures.
